fieldguide.entity.plantsjunk.fire_fly_sw: Many, many fireflies, fluttering in the night. Fun fact! the collective noun for fireflies is a 'sparkle'
fieldguide.entity.plantsjunk.butterfly.d: Butterflies, when used in artwork, can represent any kind of metamorphosis. Be it physical, spiritual or personal. This is because they are preeeeetty..
fieldguide.entity.plantsjunk.caterpillar: I've been thinking about Caterpillars and the things they don't know. All they do is feed on leaves and then they gradually grow.
fieldguide.entity.plantsjunk.snail.descr: Legends tell of snails who could fell immortal warriors with but a touch. These snails won't do that. I'm pretty sure.
fieldguide.entity.plantsjunk.dragonfly.d: Efficient and ruthless hunters, Dragonflies capture nearly 80% of all insects they pursue.
